# Payment Authorization

The payment authorization process at Acme Shop is essential for ensuring smooth transactions during purchases. When an order is submitted, a request is sent to the customer's bank or card issuer to verify payment details and check fund availability, which results in a temporary hold on the purchase amount for 3 to 7 business days. Following order processing, Acme Shop captures the funds, completing the transaction, while any holds from canceled orders are released according to the bank's timeline. Additional holds may occur for pre-orders or custom orders, and customers are encouraged to contact support for any discrepancies.

[Source: payment_methods.md#payment-authorization]
